30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 World's Greatest Stretch
10m DB Walking Lunge 22.5/15
10 PVC Split Jerk
10 Strict Press

metcon.description:
5 RFT
1 x Complex
10 HSPU
200m Run
Complex @ 70% of Jerk 1RM

hypertrophy.reasoning: Address posterior chain and arm hypertrophy while sparing CNS and legs post-metcon fatigue.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Split Jerk, 4 by 3 at 80 percent. Strength: Back Squat, 4 by 6 at 70 percent. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 1 x Complex, 10 HSPU, 200m Run. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
